svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="系统架构图" id="system-architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1845" dy="1808" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1800" pageHeight="1040" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="layer_front" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;fontSize=32;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="250" width="1760" x="20" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="layer_backend" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;fontSize=32;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="1760" x="20" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="layer_ai" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;fontSize=32;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="205" width="1760" x="20" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="layer_support" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;fontSize=32;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="1760" x="20" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="front_label" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=32;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="表现层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="145" width="220" x="30" y="82.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend_label" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=32;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="后端层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="220" x="30" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ai_label" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=32;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="AI 服务层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="125" width="220" x="30" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="browser_ui" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;fontSize=32;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="浏览器 UI
响应式界面" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="270" x="240" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vue_components" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;fontSize=32;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Vue 组件" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="350" x="593" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TpNGvynzg0PU_NGlTuy7-5" edge="1" parent="1" source="state_manage" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=32;" target="gis_render" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell
